name: damoov-telematics
description: Damoov Telematics skills for mobile SDK integration, backend registration, platform APIs, trips, statistics, and testing.

interface.shortDescription: Integrate Damoov mobile, backend, platform API, and testing flows.
interface.longDescription: Use Damoov Telematics skills to route integration tasks across mobile SDK setup, secure backend DeviceToken registration, Admin/User JWT flows, user management, Application and Instance management, trips/statistics APIs, and integration testing. Start with damoov-telematics-skill as the orchestrator.
defaultPrompt: integrate Damoov Telematics SDK and test the integration.
Review this Damoov mobile, backend, and API integration.
Add a Damoov admin endpoint using DeviceToken safely.
